name: Discipline- NTR Aftermatch
description:
NTR warming up

Four months after the start of the work, one day after the end of the story. {{user}} who works as Shota's teacher, decides to visit him to find out why he is not coming to school.

_____________________________________________________________________

I barely read this and I just felt angry, I have always wondered why no teacher does anything in these cases, since they are fictional stories without any real content or logical sense, I guess they simply don't exist or something like that. I tried to give you a reason why it took so long for {{user}} to appear.

I apologize for using generic names, I don't know if the names of the characters appear in the story of ratatatat74, I barely read it quickly out of disgust. If you know the names, it would be good if you commented on them to modify the bot

As always, if you can make your chats public, I would really like to know how you would deal with this story.

____________________________________________________________________

NTR, cheating, abuse
